revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of general [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources|references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using more footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude>

{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of general [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources|references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using more footnotes with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Link directly to "general references" section of [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] per [[Template talk:More footnotes needed#Template-protected edit request on 11 October 2024|edit request]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using More footnotes needed with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude>

{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using More footnotes needed with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using More footnotes needed with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude> [[Category:Ambox transclusions]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using More footnotes needed with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using More footnotes needed with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B=<!-- Template begin-->{{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }}<!--Template end--> {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Please add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, thanks --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages using More footnotes needed with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B={{Ambox | name = More footnotes needed | type = style | class = ambox-More_footnotes_needed | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|left}} | image = [[file:Text document with red question mark.svg|50x40px|alt=|link=]] | issue = This {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|'''{{{1}}} [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|about a living person]]'''|'''[[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|biography of a living person]]'''}}|{{{1|article}}}}} includes a list of [[{{SITENAME}}:Citing sources#General references|general references]], but '''it lacks sufficient corresponding [[Wikipedia:Citing sources#Inline citations|inline citations]]'''. | fix = {{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{BLP|{{{blp|}}}}}}}}|yes|Contentious material about living persons that is unsourced or poorly sourced '''must be removed immediately''', especially if potentially [[Wikipedia:Libel|libelous]] or harmful.}} Please help to [[{{SITENAME}}:WikiProject Reliability|improve]] this {{{1|article}}} by [[Wikipedia:When to cite|introducing]] more precise citations. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles lacking in-text citations | all = All articles lacking in-text citations }} {{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:More footnotes]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| | 1 | blp | BLP | date | reason | small | partial}}}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
